name: intentional-cognition
description: Plugin for intentional-cognition-os. Ships the /ico-your-internals skill that dog-foods ICO against the operator's own system — discovers a target, compiles its docs into an ICO workspace, runs question banks, verifies citations deterministically, and produces a structured receipts trail.
compatibility: Designed for Claude Code. Requires intentional-cognition-os installed (npm install -g intentional-cognition-os) and an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env.
